blended.narrative: Jay Peak is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 222 ft. Looking ahead, 30 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 4" of snow, highs of 49°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
